title: 1 step DFU - Update All button triggers DFU for earbuds and charge case
scenario: "Update All" button shows a single unified DFU progress bar for both earbuds and charging case instead of separate progress indicators
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen
Ensure at least one Poly Bluetooth audio device (e.g., earbuds and charging case) is connected
Navigate to Device Settings for the connected device
Observe the progress indicator shown on screen
expected: The "Update All" button triggers a single DFU (Device Firmware Update) process for both earbuds and the charging case simultaneously, showing one unified progress bar from 0% to 99% for both devices.
